prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, Renji Dawnblade in a crimson cloak and Mika Oakspire in a neat vest and guild sash; Renji approaches the wooden guild counter, unfolding a weathered quest map and presenting it to Mika. Mika looks up from her ledger with a welcoming smile, gesturing to the map as they both lean in, cinematic lighting, anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika picks up a quill, leans over the map alongside Renji, and carefully marks a location on the parchment. Renji nods in approval, both characters focused on the map in a moment of shared tactical coordination, consistent identities, cinematic camera, no text, no watermark.
